legalDisclaimer: This document is provided for information purposes to govern club use of Kifpadel. It does not replace legal advice. For questions, contact support@kifpadel.tn.
clubCharterMetaDescription: Terms of use and good practices for Kifpadel partner clubs in Tunisia.
clubCharterSubtitle: Good usage commitments, free sign-up, and the collaboration framework between your club and the platform.
clubCharterS1Body: Kifpadel provides clubs with an online space to showcase courts, manage slots, bookings, open matches and tournaments, and interact with players registered on the platform.
clubCharterS2Title: 2. Free sign-up with no financial commitment
clubCharterS2Body:
Creating a club profile and accessing currently offered features is free as of this charter. No sign-up fee or subscription is required to open a club account.

Kifpadel may later offer optional paid services. Any pricing change will be announced in advance and will only apply with your explicit consent.
clubCharterS3Body: The club agrees to provide accurate information (name, city, address, contact details, court count, displayed prices) and keep it up to date. Published slots must reflect actual court availability.
clubCharterS4Title: 4. Good usage and respect for players
clubCharterS5Body:
For bookings and matches, the club may access certain player data (display name, contact details needed for booking, club-related history). This data must only be used to organise padel sessions and the club–player relationship through Kifpadel.

The club must not resell, widely disclose or reuse this data for marketing without explicit consent. See the club privacy policy for details.
clubCharterS6Body: Kifpadel may suspend or remove a club from the platform in case of serious breach of this charter, repeated reports, fraud, or endangering players. Moderation decisions may be logged. The club may contact support to request a review.
clubCharterS7Body: The club remains solely responsible for on-site reception, facility safety, on-site pricing and compliance with local regulations. Kifpadel is not party to play agreements between players nor to on-site payments between players and the club, except for features expressly handled by the platform.
clubCharterS8Body: By checking the acceptance box when creating the club, the manager declares having read and accepted this charter and the club privacy policy on behalf of the represented club.
clubPrivacyMetaDescription: How partner clubs process player personal data on Kifpadel.
clubPrivacySubtitle: How player data is made available to clubs and what obligations apply.
clubPrivacyS1Body: Kifpadel operates the platform and governs club access to data required for the service. Contact: support@kifpadel.tn.
clubPrivacyS2Body: Depending on features used, the club may see: player display name, phone number (if verified and relevant for booking), contact email, booking and participation history at the club, incident reports and trust information under Kifpadel rules.
clubPrivacyS3Body: This data is provided only to: confirm or manage a booking; organise a match or tournament; notify the player of slot changes; handle an incident related to a session at the club.
clubPrivacyS4Body: The club must not: bulk-export data beyond operational need; send unsolicited commercial messages; share contact details with third parties without legal basis; retain data longer than necessary once the playing relationship ends.
clubPrivacyS5Body: Club manager accounts must be protected with a strong password. Access must be limited to authorised staff. Any suspected data breach must be reported promptly to support@kifpadel.tn.
clubPrivacyS6Body: Players may exercise their rights (access, rectification, objection within legal limits) through Kifpadel. The club must cooperate and not obstruct requests relayed by the platform.
clubPrivacyS7Body: This policy may change. The current version is shown at the top of the page. Acceptance of a new version may be required for major updates.
